title: haplopappus suffruticosus var. tenuis
intro: Haplopappus suffruticosus var. tenuis is a variety of the shrub-like plant known as Haplopappus suffruticosus, which is a perennial species in the sunflower family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Haplopappus suffruticosus var. tenuis include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and ease respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Haplopappus suffruticosus var. tenuis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its dried leaves can be used in herbal remedies to leverage its medicinal properties.
